# JIATF-401 Selects Lattice as Enterprise Tactical Command and Control Platform for C-UAS

JIATF-401 has selected Anduril's Lattice platform as its enterprise tactical command and control solution for counter-unmanned aircraft systems (C-UAS) operations, advancing integrated defense capabilities against aerial threats.
